calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for James De Long (Trustee).

Ms. Rasch addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to the request for guideline fees for a one year period when the accounting period was for 10 months, the request for tolls and mileage, reimbursement of mileage and the missed doctor's appointment to the Petitioner's Companion, sale and distribution of the personal property without prior Court authority, etc. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (175 Stillings Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94131)
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for (trustee) James De Long.

The Court asked if an appraisal had been filed. Ms. Rasch reported that it was filed on 3/30/16, that the property was transferred from the conservatorship to the trust, that it is not newly acquired and transfers at the same value and that the Inventory & Appraisal is less than a year old. The sale on improved real property was confirmed at $1,335,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 3/29/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,260,000.00 is required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
